items.title: DynamoDB Advanced — Streams, PartiQL & Enhanced Client
items.description: Advanced DynamoDB topics for DVA-C02. DynamoDB Streams with Lambda, PartiQL, Enhanced Client for Java, optimistic locking, single-table design patterns, and Write Sharding.

items.title: Handling Contention
items.description: Strategies for dealing with race conditions, concurrent writes, hot spots, and lock contention in distributed systems including optimistic locking, MVCC, distributed locks, and queue-based serialization.
